item.description: Today celebrates the signing of the Declaration of Independence. It lists the acts of tyranny that justify the Declaration. I consider reading them a minimum requirement of this day. The paragraph immediately after them is also particularly powerful. Anyone who does not stand by them by definition cannot be a patriot or claim to be proud to be American. https://www.archives.gov/founding-docs/declaration-transcript
item.dc:creator: ChewyTheWookie

item.title: Get rid of everyone who refuses to stop this.
item.dc:creator: KatLuvr54

item.title: TL;DR The Irish dance association told the Atty. General to fuck off
item.description: Florida's attorney general tried to force a transgender teenager out of an Irish dance competition. The entire Irish dancing community stood up and refused to let it happen. The North American Irish Dance Championships opened this week in Orlando, and one dancer became the target of the state's top lawyer. Attorney General James Uthmeier sent a letter to the two organizations behind the event, demanding they ban transgender girls from the girls' categories, and threatened legal action if they refused. The competition has exactly one transgender dancer slated to compete. She's a teenager. The dance world answered fast. A petition went up in support of trans dancers, and the wording left no room for doubt: "We, the Irish dancing community, voice our unequivocal support for transgender dancers." It celebrated their right to compete as their true selves and to win, without exception. The organizers didn't cave. Uthmeier set a June 30 deadline for a rule change. It came and went. The championships opened on schedule with the inclusive policy fully intact, the same one the teaching community backed years ago. Source: GayBuzzer Facebook account.
item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.title: Happy 4th and happy goal weight day!
item.description:
Left is 194.7#, back in December... and right is today, at 145!
Those grey shorts used to be tight in me, now they barely stay up. Better than that, I feel better, I sleep better, and my mental health is better. Shout out to my doc for the help, my dogs for the love, and ME for getting it done!
Puppy tax Elli Bay
Puppy tax Red. Happy 4th to all my fellow Americans fighting to good fight how we can!
item.dc:creator: MadamPuddifoot

item.dc:creator: joeyecho101

item.title: Revolution Calling
item.description: (Midterm voting starts on July 3rd....) It's July 4th. It's early in the morning, and I'm exhausted. My neighbors decided they wanted to set off fireworks for most of last night. I know I'm not the only one affected by this. There are people with young kids, animals, and other disabled veterans who are under an incredible amount of stress right now, much like I am. My physical conditions have flared up, including seizures and stomach issues that I don't need to go into. And it's not because of the jump scares. It's largely because of the overwhelming feeling of dread and the awareness of the continued erosion of our constitutional rights. I'm depressed because it feels like too few people are standing up against the tyranny that's on display. So many flag-flying Americans swore up and down that they would resist a tyrannical government. Now many openly support it, pouring money into a billionaire who couldn't care less whether they live or die. The stress is made even worse knowing it's the beginning of the month, the energy bills keep climbing, and I'm losing the ability to move forward with anything—let alone accomplish the basics. I feel like my legs have been cut out from under me by this administration, just like so many other Americans who are paying attention. My anger has long since boiled away. Everything has evaporated as I watch people claim the title of "patriot" despite never having done anything selfless for their communities, let alone their country. And you don't have to serve in the military to earn that title. You just have to be you—a citizen, or someone striving to become one—going through your daily life and choosing to be better than the example our current administration sets. That's what it takes to be a patriot. That's what it takes to be an American: helping your neighbor, no matter who they are. As far as I'm concerned, any celebration should wait until after the midterm elections—if enough of you show up and begin to set this country back on a better course. http://youtube.com/post/UgkxrYngCyeDW3ASydVUCJaTEjySy9K1DMyB
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

26 Man Tax: Adriano Toloza
"Kindness is the golden chain by which society is bound together." - Johann Wolfgang von Goethe So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Dump of totally useless stuff i had to get rid of.
item.description:
Need friends like these ....
Only acceptable harmless punishment .
We are.
Absolute Legend For This !
Australians love a car number plate joke and this one is hard to beat !
Hope it enjoyed the meal.
Mosquitos the second I open my screen door ....
Don't mind if I do...
Goose deterrent ...
I’m sorry, my ladder people need me.
I need this in my life . No ad. I'll make my own.
Nairobi, Kenya. What a view !
Pregnancy Test ...
Professional cheeseburger spinner.
Quality. Mine are still pretty good too.
That's a pretty fascinating pair of scissors my man got.
The 1862' "mouse killer" mouse trap ...
The bike couldn't handle the aura !
There seemed to be a long queue and he couldn’t wait ...
Wendy's loves huh ???
The "Wurstbrötchenaushöhler". Yes.
Sane Clown Posse ...
Okaaaayyyyy ....
Twenty five years ...

item.title: Didn't RockStar's GTA6 start the whole NO Disc BS?
item.description: https://x.com/ConstantGTA/status/2073176210679759069 TLDR Sony's announcedment that they are ending all physical media in 2028 has met with such backlash, even Rockstar wants nothing to do with them, since it's hurting GTA6. Even though RockStar originally announced that GTA6 will not have a physical disc. Also, I find it funny Sony didn't expect a backlash to their plans. Now they are being sued by consumers, publishers, and devs alike! MAJOR NEWS https://imgur.com/gallery/sony-log-once-every-3-yrs-we-delete-everything-you-own-PGUcUD7 Sony has enacted a policy where if you don't log in once every 3yrs, they will delete your account and everything you digitally own. Where as Microsoft has said, if you've made at least 1 digital purchase, they will never close your account, no matter how inactive it is.
item.dc:creator: Imadethisaccounttopost

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1737 (dressing oddly)
item.description:
Lets get this bread!
It's not a symptom, it's a result.
Chimney Swift (I think) by David Allen Sibley. Swifts are like the ultimate bird to me.
I do wish I had a linen suit like that. But other than that... yeah, I am already Niles Crane Maxxing [minus the British girlfriend... or the brother...]
Ouch.
More swifts
Harris' Hawk
They should bring back Dino-riders
I think it should be a red hand on a black background, like old cave paintings.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "What Doing? Thank you!" ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
